steps.title: Use circle standard form
steps.content:
A circle with center $(h,k)$ and radius $r$ has equation
$$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$$
For center $(-4,2)$, the left side must be
$$(x+4)^2+(y-2)^2$$

steps.title: Choose the matching equation
steps.content:
The circle equation must use center $(-4,2)$ and squared radius $100$:
$$(x+4)^2+(y-2)^2=100$$
The answer is D.
